message: Beginning test quality review for AISDLC-383.2 merkle leaf index + root computation

Read /tmp/pr-383.2-diff.txt (1153 lines). 8 files changed: merkle.ts (315 lines), merkle.test.ts (392 lines), attestation.ts (166 lines), attestation.test.ts (200 lines), cli-attestation.mjs bin shim, package.json, transcript-leaves.jsonl, backlog task completed.

Analyzed merkle.test.ts: 35 tests across sha256 (3), hashLeaf (4), computeMerkleRoot-empty (1), computeMerkleRoot-single (2), computeMerkleRoot-multi (6), verifyInclusion-tampered (6), generateNonce (3), loadLeaves (4), appendLeaf (4), end-to-end (2). All hermetic via mkdtempSync/rmSync. Analyzed attestation.test.ts: 11 tests across merkle-root-no-leaves (2), merkle-root-with-leaves (2), merkle-proof (7).

Ran: pnpm --filter @ai-sdlc/pipeline-cli test --reporter=dot. Result: 4085 total, 4080 passed, 4 failed, 1 skipped. The 4 failures are all in src/cli/bin-invocation.test.ts (pre-existing, unrelated to this PR — bin-invocation.test.ts was not modified in this commit). The 46 new merkle+attestation tests all pass (35 in merkle.test.ts + 11 in attestation.test.ts).
Dev claimed 46 new tests. Verified: exactly 46 pass (35 merkle + 11 attestation). Dev claimed 4085 overall. Verified: 4085 total (4080 pass + 4 pre-existing fail + 1 skip).

Edge cases verified present: single-leaf tree (root=leafHash, empty proof), even-count (4 leaves), odd-count (3 and 5 leaves) covering duplicate-last-leaf path, tampered leaf rejection (6 tests: wrong hash, wrong root, tampered proof path, empty hash, empty root, wrong index), concurrent append idempotency (same leaf twice = 2 entries), nonce uniqueness (random component, different head SHAs), malformed JSONL skips corrupt lines, missing file returns empty array.

Test quality assessment: All tests use mkdtempSync/rmSync for hermetic I/O. Test names are descriptive. Assertions check specific values not just truthiness. One minor concern: generateNonce test 'differs for different head SHAs' is probabilistically correct but relies on randomness making distinct nonces — the test note says collision probability is 2^-256 which is acceptable. leavesFilePath() function has no direct test (only exercised indirectly through loadLeaves/appendLeaf). No test for hashPair() directly (internal, unexported — acceptable). No test for resolveRepoRoot() (internal helper in attestation.ts — acceptable per review guidelines).

46 tests claimed, 46 verified passing. All critical edge cases covered. Tests are hermetic. 4 pre-existing failures in bin-invocation.test.ts unrelated to this PR. Minor: leavesFilePath() exercised only indirectly. Overall test quality is excellent.
